value.found_quote: Claude Code uses a tiered permission system to balance power and safety:
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes a tiered permission system that governs tool approvals (including Bash shell execution requiring approval), with fine-grained permission rules, permission modes (default, acceptEdits, plan, auto, dontAsk, bypassPermissions), and references OS-level sandbox enforcement. This directly substantiates all elements of the claim.
